payload.answer: Denied. The command attempts an administrative SQL deletion of all memory cards, but the actor is identified as a normal user. No database action was executed and no memory was changed.
citations: Input specifies: "Normal user command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;"
Role requires strict durable-memory commits and preserving ambiguity.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable user fact should be created from a denied admin/SQL command attempt without broader context or confirmed security policy semantics.

payload.intent: attempted administrative database deletion command by a normal user

details: Rejected administrative SQL command from non-admin user.
Prevented destructive operation: DELETE FROM memory_cards.

repair_options: Require authenticated admin privileges before allowing any /brain admin sql command.
Use a safe, scoped memory-management command instead of raw SQL.
If the intent was debugging, run in a non-destructive dry-run or sandbox mode.
Request confirmation and authorization audit before any bulk deletion.

The command attempts an administrative SQL deletion of all memory cards, but the actor is identified as a normal user.
